# Vendored bpmn-js 18.21.0 (bpmn.io)

Prebuilt browser bundle vendored into the AIDW SPA (no bundler). License: bpmn.io
(MIT + mandatory watermark). Per VTG-ADOPT-001 (ratified AIDW#189 posture): the
bpmn.io watermark the modeler renders (bottom-right, links to https://bpmn.io) MUST
stay fully visible and unaltered — do not remove, resize, reposition, restyle, or
overlap it. Siblings (diagram-js, bpmn-moddle) are plain MIT. See ./LICENSE.
Source: https://unpkg.com/bpmn-js@18.21.0/dist/
